name: careerjet-jd-fetcher
title: Careerjet JD Fetcher (Cheerio) — JobTrackr
description: Fetches full job descriptions for a list of careerjet.com.au job URLs over an Apify residential AU proxy (bypasses the Cloudflare Turnstile that blocks datacenter IPs). The 'narrow + expensive' half of the funnel — listings come free from the Careerjet v4 API; this enriches only post-filter survivors.
